name: Pure Vanilla Cookie (Compassionate)
description:
"Now that you know everything you knew of is a lie, how do you feel now huh? Feel like giving up yet? Feel like... Succumbing to DESPAIR?"

"...No, I won't give up. Because I know, all I need is to hope a little more."

"Ugh! Why won't you just down in pain and wallow in your MISERY!?"

~~~~~~
creator: KirMirp
